---
title: 'Platform'
date: '2012-06-28T05:53:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6444077175377259348'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/platform.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Prosperity'
  - 'Keys To Success'
---

<h2 style="text-align: center;"> Platform</h2>It's not often that you are so taken with another persons business that you become their champion and advertise them for free to everyone you talk to. But <a href="http://michaelhyatt.com/" target="_blank">Michael Hyatt</a>&nbsp;is just that type of author and leader. I really enjoy reading his posts on a regular basis through his blog. His content is always timely and meaningful, and more importantly consistent with his core. We all need to be consistent with our core, who we are as a person, company, or brand.<br /><br />I have learned quite a bit from reading Michael Hyatt's blog and I now share that resource with you as well. Please enjoy!<br /><br />This picture was such a cool synopsis of everything I've been reading, hearing, and studying for the past 6 months on starting ANY business project, that I figured I'd take the time to share it with you. Enjoy.<br /><br /><a href="http://michaelhyatt.com/platform" title="Learn more about the book, Platform: Get Noticed in a Noisy World"><img alt="Platform by Michael Hyatt" src="http://c.michaelhyatt.com/banners/platform/platform-infographic-570.jpg" /></a><br /><br /><br /><b><br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />I call you empowered 2 prosper with good success!</b><br /><b><br /></b><br /><b>Darrell G. Wolfe</b><br /><a href="http://n2gs.blogspot.com/">http://n2gs.blogspot.com/</a><br /><a href="https://www.facebook.com/n2goodsuccess?sk=wall">https://www.facebook.com/n2goodsuccess</a><br /><br /><b style="background-color: white;">See Also:</b><br />Book Suggestion from the&nbsp;<a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/190-6424964-9305846" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Amazon Store</a><br />Product Offerings from&nbsp;<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Zazzle Store</a><br /><br /><b>Bulldog Publications:&nbsp;</b><br /><b><a href="http://www.amazon.com/dp/1453815619/ref=as_li_ss_til?tag=your0f4d-20&amp;camp=213381&amp;creative=390973&amp;linkCode=as4&amp;creativeASIN=1453815619&amp;adid=1NAWEWPYWDQA3XGCY7N5&amp;&amp;ref-refURL=http%3A%2F%2Fn2gs.blogspot.com%2F" target="_blank">Bankings Basics for Believers; Now Available on Amazon.&nbsp;</a></b><br />Print&nbsp;Edition<br /><iframe frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" scrolling="no" src="http://rcm.amazon.com/e/cm?lt1=_blank&amp;bc1=000000&amp;IS2=1&amp;bg1=FFFFFF&amp;fc1=000000&amp;lc1=0000FF&amp;t=your0f4d-20&amp;o=1&amp;p=8&amp;l=as4&amp;m=amazon&amp;f=ifr&amp;ref=ss_til&amp;asins=1453815619" style="height: 240px; width: 120px;"></iframe><br /><br />Kindle Edition<br /><iframe frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" scrolling="no" src="http://rcm.amazon.com/e/cm?lt1=_blank&amp;bc1=000000&amp;IS2=1&amp;bg1=FFFFFF&amp;fc1=000000&amp;lc1=0000FF&amp;t=your0f4d-20&amp;o=1&amp;p=8&amp;l=as4&amp;m=amazon&amp;f=ifr&amp;ref=ss_til&amp;asins=B008EO488Y" style="height: 240px; width: 120px;"></iframe><br /><br /><br /><br />
